name: Lead Handler
description: Captures and spam-filters enquiries from the flintagentic.co.uk contact form, logs genuine leads to a spreadsheet, and pushes an instant phone notification the moment a real prospect gets in touch.

name: Sentinel AML
description: An agentic anti-money-laundering investigator. It works compliance alerts itself — running OFAC sanctions screening and Companies House lookups — then produces a structured decision, confidence score and audit-ready narrative on a web dashboard.

name: FAQ Agent
description: A CrewAI-powered customer service agent that answers strictly from a defined knowledge base and hands off anything outside it to a human, so it never invents an answer.

name: SOC Analyst Agent
description: A modular alert-triage pipeline for SOC teams. Groups raw alerts into incidents, enriches them with IP reputation and user context, then has Claude classify severity, explain its reasoning, and recommend concrete next actions.

name: FPL Form Player Picker
description: Checks the Fantasy Premier League API each gameweek, finds in-form players facing one of the bottom three teams, and pushes a ranked shortlist straight to your phone before the transfer deadline.
